refined_caption: The hospital bathroom appears to be unhygienic with visible dirt and a trash can. The toilet is also present in the dirty environment.
complaint_description: I was appalled by the condition of the hospital bathroom, which was dirty and had a strong unpleasant odor. The trash can was overflowing and the toilet was not clean. This is unacceptable for a healthcare facility.
voice_text: The bathroom in this hospital is disgusting, it's really dirty and smells bad.
